description: Sebastian Bohr leads a discussion on decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs) with a panel of experts including Karen Schaller, Alex Migutko, and Kael Kado, focusing on the ease of creating DAOs on Solana and the potential for community engagement.
topic_summary: The panel explores the creation and governance of DAOs on Solana, discussing tools and frameworks available for building DAOs, the challenges of community engagement, and the future of decentralized governance [t=110.42].
